title: Configuration Settings
confidence_rationale: Repository evidence supports the Docker hardening finding, but production runtime configuration was not available.
evidence_quality_rationale: Source evidence shows a configuration gap and manual runtime evidence is required to close the reviewer concern.
manual_evidence_items: Container hardening exception or remediation ticket
ticket_ready_action: Add an explicit non-root USER directive or attach production runtime evidence proving non-root execution.
unresolved_reviewer_note: Round 2 evidence-completeness review could not confirm production non-root runtime.

title: Vulnerability Monitoring and Scanning
confidence_rationale: CI configuration shows automated dependency scanning, but scan results and remediation tracking are outside the repository.
evidence_quality_rationale: The workflow proves a scan command exists but not that vulnerabilities are reviewed and remediated.
manual_evidence_items: Risk acceptance records for unresolved findings
ticket_ready_action: Attach the latest scan results and remediation tracking evidence.

title: Information Input Validation
confidence_rationale: The assessed code path contains direct validation logic and no manual evidence is needed for this code-level outcome.
evidence_quality_rationale: The source anchor directly supports the validation claim for the scoped route.
ticket_ready_action: Keep validation tests current as routes change.
